title: Projects
description: Manage project members, role assignments, and visibility

emptyProjects.title: No projects yet
emptyProjects.description: Creating a project automatically provisions Owner, Editor, and Viewer roles.

emptyMembers.title: No members yet
emptyMembers.description: Invite members here, then adjust their project roles.

emptySearch.title: No projects found
emptySearch.description: No projects match the current keyword.

createDialog.title: New project
createDialog.description: Preset roles and the creator's Owner membership are created with the project.
createDialog.name: Project name
createDialog.logoDescription: Click the image to upload or replace the project logo
createDialog.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe what this project is for

inviteDialog.title: Invite member
inviteDialog.description: Choose the project-level role this member receives.

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address

settings.logoDescription: Click the image to upload or replace the project logo
settings.visibilityDescription: Public projects can be discovered by non-members; private projects are invite-only.

workflows.title: Workflow configuration
workflows.description: Choose the workflows this project can use when coordinating task execution.
workflows.searchDescription: Search the remote workflow list by keyword and add matches.
workflows.emptySelected: No workflows are linked to this project.

removeDialog.title: Remove member
removeDialog.description: Remove "{{username}}" from this project? This will not delete the user account.
